IgScan 1.0.0

  • Install
  • Vignettes

    • IgScan single-cell workflow

  • News/Changelog
  • Reference
  • FAQ

Reference

Running IgScan workflows

Functions that load input data and run the main steps of the IgScan workflow.

Run_IgBlast_from_RawData()

Run IgBlast on raw NGS data

Run_IgScan_Annotation()

Run IgScan Annotation

Run_IgScan_FullWorkflow()

Run IgScan Full Workflow

Combining IgScan with single cell objects

Functions to combine the IgScan contig annotation with a scRNA-seq object.

combine_IgScan_Seurat()

Combine IgScan Output with a Seurat Object

combine_IgScan_SingleCellExperiment()

Combine IgScan Output with a Single Cell Experiment Object

Assign incomplete BCR cells to clonotypes

Function to infer the complete BCR in cells with partial information.

rescue_single_chain_cells()

Rescue cells with incomplete BCR (single chains)

Filtering of sample crossed contamination

Functions that can be run to flag/remove crossed contamination in bulk and single-cell data.

filter_BCR_contam_bulk()

Filter BCR contamination in bulk IG-NGS data

filter_BCR_contam_single_cell()

Filter BCR-based contamination in single-cell data

filter_SampleTag_contam_BDRhapsody()

Filter SampleTag Contamination in BD Rhapsody Data

Recalculation of clonal identifiers and clonal abundances

Functions that must be run when filtering IgScan annotated datasets to re-estimate clonal frequencies.

recalculate_IDs_bulk()

Recalculate IgScan IDs for Bulk NGS Data

recalculate_IDs_single_cell()

Recalculate IgScan IDs for Single Cell Data

Export IgScan results in AIRR format

Functions to export IgScan results in the consensus AIRR format.

export_AIRR_format()

Export IgScan outputs in AIRR format

Infer BCR phylogenetic trees from IgScan

Functions to adapt IgScan outputs for other tools for BCR phylogenetic inference.

prepare_gctree_input()

Prepare gctree inputs from IgScan annotated datasets

Contents

Developed by Ian Márquez-López, Ferran Nadeu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
